description: Fix mobile signal colors to match Pearl Mineral V2 doctrine

mobile-parity-checker.evidence: socelle_theme.dart signal colors updated: signalUp 0xFF22C55E → 0xFF5F8A72 (matches web signal.up #5F8A72), signalDown 0xFFEF4444 → 0xFF8E6464 (matches web signal.down #8E6464), signalWarn 0xFFF59E0B → 0xFFA97A4C (matches web signal.warn #A97A4C). All 60+ references across mobile features now use Pearl Mineral V2 doctrine colors.
